result.name: process
fold_many0
result.signature:
pub fn fold_many0<I, E, F, G, H, R>(
  parser: F,
  init: H,
  g: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = R, Error = E>
where
  I: Clone + InputLength,
  F: Parser<I, Error = E>,
  G: FnMut(R, <F as Parser<I>>::Output) -> R,
  H: FnMut() -> R,
  E: ParseError<I>,
{
  FoldMany0 {
    parser,
    g,
    init,
    r: PhantomData,
  }
}
